Hello.

Personal Website

Under Construction.

We are an independent research analyst with twenty years of experience. We love exciting new technologies and the subsequent entrepreneurial driven innovation which deliver them, but we fundamentally believe consumer education and consumer protection is a massive obstacle. Our exclusive aim is to provide a completely free and non-commercial informational gripe site website outlining indisputable facts coupled with our personal research, opinions, and experience to assist the billions of curious yet uneducated or inexperienced web surfers form an opinion.

Disclaimer: We are NOT in any way whatsoever affiliated with any domestic or foregin corporation, non-profit organization, or development team. The use of this domain name is a non-commercial initiative without any products or services, and without any monetization efforts or expectations, published under the NOMINATIVE FAIR USE doctrine showcasing personal opinions as a gripe site which are protected under the First Ammendment. We have not ever, and are not now, suggesting or claiming any; affiliations, endorsements, or sponsorships whatsoever. This domain name is not for sale and has never been listed with any domain brokerage firm worldwide.

established: January 25, 2014
